introSection: Sounding Roller Coaster (Chinese: 探空过山车) was a steel roller coaster formerly located at Yuncheng Shundi Mausoleum Scenic Area in Yuncheng, Shanxi, China.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster was first captured on aerial images in 2008.

A 2022 drone video showed the coaster still standing, but by 2024, it had been removed.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: It is a Sounding Roller Coaster by Zhejiang Juma Entertainment.

fullText:
Sounding Roller Coaster (Chinese: 探空过山车) was a steel roller coaster formerly located at Yuncheng Shundi Mausoleum Scenic Area in Yuncheng, Shanxi, China.

The coaster was first captured on aerial images in 2008.

A 2022 drone video showed the coaster still standing, but by 2024, it had been removed.

It is a Sounding Roller Coaster by Zhejiang Juma Entertainment.
